name: desktop-automation-playbook
description: Inspect or operate native Windows applications through Prometheus's six desktop wrappers, including exact-window actions, native-resolution region recapture, accessibility controls, deterministic waits, macros, and isolated background automation. Use for native apps, OS UI, or desktop modals; use browser tools for ordinary web pages and terminal tools for shell work.

resources.description: Full wrapper recipes, coordinate rules, accessibility actions, waits, macros, background-worker guidance, and recovery details.
Observed guardrail for non-disruptive/background desktop sandbox preflight and runtime-dependent desktop tools.
Historical guidance for workflows that require an existing user browser profile.
Recovery guidance for stale screenshot IDs and likely-noop loops during scrolling.
Fallback guidance when accessibility or window-text extraction is unavailable.
Real Windows desktop stress-test findings and recovery paths.
Historical approval-loop failure and recovery evidence.
Historical input-targeting and close-tab avoidance evidence.
Historical workflow recipe retained for reference.
